Hero.name: Vitor Moraes
Hero.headline: Digital solutions that drive your business growth.
Hero.description: I design and develop custom web systems for businesses and retailers seeking operational efficiency, a professional digital presence, and measurable results.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Each project is a tailored solution, developed with a focus on solving real business challenges and generating tangible value for the client.

telma.title: Telma Online
telma.description: A real-time multiplayer platform that digitizes the classic Brazilian card game Telma. The solution uses WebSockets for instant communication between players, featuring a room system, dynamic rounds, and dispute mechanics — delivering a fluid and engaging experience that connects users from any location.

fluxo.title: Fluxo
fluxo.description: An integrated management system for local businesses that automates inventory control, sales, CRM, and financial reconciliation on a single platform. The intelligent dashboard provides proactive restocking alerts, real-time revenue metrics, and customer re-engagement tools — reducing hours of manual work and optimizing decision-making.

About.title: About
About.description: Full-Stack Developer with expertise in creating complete digital solutions — from database to user interface. My focus is transforming business needs into efficient, scalable systems with flawless user experience. Every project is driven by a results-oriented mindset, ensuring deliverables that generate real impact.
About.contactDescription: Ready to take your business to the next level? Get in touch to discuss how I can help.
